rows.description: Computus Jo: Atwell Rectoris a 2do Die Novembris 1734 ad secundum diem novembris 1735.
rows.notes: Added from gpt-5-mini; gemini-flash missed this top-level header. The description is accurate upon visual verification.
rows.section_header: Computus Jo: Atwell Rectoris a 2do Die Novembris 1734 ad secundum diem novembris 1735.

rows.notes: Visual override for description. Read as 'Arrearagia recepta'. Corrected 'Arrearsagia' from gemini-flash and 'Arrearagie' from gpt-5-mini to 'Arrearagia', and confirmed 'recepta'. Both extractors got the row type and amounts correct.
Consensus on amounts. Description chosen from gpt-5-mini as 'Guinear' is visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Guineaar'.
rows.english_description: Arrears received from the Guinear estate.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears received from the Guinear estate, amounting to £80 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for description and amounts. gpt-5-mini misread 'w' as 'v' and '1' shilling as '5'. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash is visually more accurate (includes trailing dash). The note in gemini-flash about '111' being stylized as 'J' is a good observation but does not change the value.

rows.notes: Extracted from gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash incorrectly combined this header with the subsequent subtotal. Visual verification confirms 'Act Supper.' is a standalone header with no amounts.
Amounts are consensus. Description taken from gpt-5-mini but visually corrected to include the trailing dash, which was present in gemini-flash's (incorrectly merged) description.
Consensus across both extractors.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash incorrectly stated no monetary amounts were present for this row; visual verification clearly shows amounts of 17 pounds, 11 shillings, 8 pence.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from the Commoners' Library (contribution to Act Supper), amounting to £17 11s 8d.

rows.description: Recd of Mr. Quastion By Mr. Flole
rows.notes: Visual override for amounts. Both extractors incorrectly assigned the amounts 17/11/8 to this row. Visually, these amounts are aligned with and apply to the preceding 'Commoners Library' row, with this row serving as a descriptive sub-entry or clarification for those funds.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Quastion received (delivered) by Mr Flole.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Quastion received by Mr Flole, amount not specified in the structured fields.
